kinesisanalytics.applicationoutput.lambd.Description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the destination Lambda function to write to.  To specify an earlier version of the Lambda function than the latest, include the Lambda function version in the Lambda function ARN. For more information about Lambda ARNs, see [Example ARNs: AWS Lambda](/general/latest/gr/aws-arns-and-namespaces.html#arn-syntax-lambda)
ARN of the IAM role that Amazon Kinesis Analytics can assume to write to the destination function on your behalf. You need to grant the necessary permissions to this role.
